creator: andreast@FreeBSD.org
text:
The latest gdb, 7.6, brings native PowerPC FreeBSD support. We just need enable it in ports.
There is a minor glitch which needs patching gdb itself. Namely, ALL_TARGET_OBJ is missing ppcfbsd-tdep.o. This part is already sent upstream.

The attached patch enables PowerPC support in gdb.
The patch is made with svn diff in the devel/gdb directory.

Fix: Apply the attached patch :)

Patch attached with submission follows:
How-To-Repeat: -
